mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_message (conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, message_type, notification_type, related_id, is_read) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{notificationType}, #{relatedId}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM t_message m JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM t_message WHERE message_type = 'chat' AND (sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY conversation_id ) latest ON m.id = latest.max_id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON m.sender_id = u.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM t_message m LEFT JOIN t_user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.message_type = 'notification' ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND message_type = 'notification' AND is_read = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND message_type = 'chat' AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE t_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND message_type = 'notification' AND is_read = 0
